title: Production Technician
description: Operate precision manufacturing equipment in cleanroom environment producing surgical instruments. Day shift available. Hands-on training provided. Fair-chance hiring partner with Tarrant County Workforce Solutions.

title: Yard Helper
description: Couple and uncouple rail cars, throw switches, and maintain yard safety. Outdoor work, all weather. Background-friendly second-chance program. CDL not required.

title: Construction Apprentice
description: Entry-level apprenticeship on commercial build sites across DFW. Learn carpentry, concrete, and site safety. Tools provided. Reentry-friendly employer.

title: Warehouse Associate
description: Sort, price, and stock donated goods. Operate pallet jacks. Full-time with benefits after 90 days. Fair-chance hiring core to mission.

title: Production Assembly Worker
description: Assembly line work on F-35 fighter program. Repetitive standing, hand tool use, light lifting. Rotating shifts. Background-check-friendly for non-classified roles.

title: Food Service Worker
description: Cafeteria and patient meal prep at John Peter Smith Hospital. Day and evening shifts. Uniforms provided. Second-chance hiring program.

title: Vehicle Maintenance Technician
description: Service and repair Trinity Metro buses and TEXRail vehicles. CDL training provided to qualifying candidates. Public-sector benefits package. Fair-chance friendly.

title: Warehouse Associate
description: Pick, pack, and ship at the AllianceTexas distribution hub. Forklift certification provided. Multiple shifts including overnight. Background-friendly.

title: General Laborer
description: Site cleanup, material handling, and demolition support across DFW commercial projects. Tools and PPE provided. Fair-chance hiring partner.

title: Dishwasher / Kitchen Utility
description: Dish room and kitchen sanitation at Naval Air Station Joint Reserve Base. Day and evening shifts. Background check required (base access); fair-chance friendly for many records.

title: Light Industrial Staffer
description: Temp-to-hire placements at Tarrant County manufacturers and warehouses. Same-day onboarding. Reentry navigators on site. Multiple shifts.

title: Custodial Technician
description: Clean and maintain commercial office buildings in downtown Fort Worth. Evening shift 6pm-2am. Supplies and equipment provided. Nationwide fair-chance employer.
